messages.cancelConfirmation: Line {{number}} will be cancelled. Are you sure?

list.title: SIM Card List
list.searchPlaceholder: Search line no, buyer, or customer...

empty.title: No SIM Cards Found
empty.description: No SIM cards are registered in the system yet.

filters.activationRangeHint: Activation date (start and end month inclusive)
filters.periodOrderError: End period cannot be before start period

list.quickEditDateSaveHint: Date and monthly sale price: click outside the field or press Tab to save. You cannot leave the page while the date has unsaved changes.
list.quickEditUnsavedDescription: There is an unsaved change to the activation date. If you leave or close quick edit, it will be discarded.

delete.title: Delete SIM Card
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete SIM card "{{phoneNumber}}"?

import.pageTitle: SIM cards — Bulk upload with Excel
import.uploadDescription: Drag and drop or select a .xlsx or .xls file containing your SIM card list.
import.formatIntro: The first row must be column headers. LINE NO is required; others are optional.
import.formatIntroNew: Required columns: LINE NO, PARENT COMPANY, MONTHLY COST, MONTHLY SALE PRICE. Date can be DD.MM.YYYY or Excel serial date.
import.formatProvider: PARENT COMPANY — Owning company (e.g. Ornet, Metbel). Created automatically if missing.
import.formatOperator: OPERATOR — Turkcell, Vodafone, or Türk Telekom
import.formatBuyer: BUYER — Buyer company name (must match a customer in the system)
import.formatCost: MONTHLY COST — Monthly cost (₺, TRY, spaces cleaned automatically)
import.formatSale: MONTHLY SALE PRICE — Monthly sale price (₺, TRY, spaces cleaned automatically)
import.formatDate: DATE — Activation date (DD.MM.YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, or Excel serial date)
import.formatCustomerTitle: CUSTOMER TITLE — Assigned customer (saved empty if not in system)
import.formatGprsSerialNo: GPRS SERIAL NO — Device serial number
import.formatStatus: STATUS — available, active, subscription, cancelled (default: available)
import.parseError: File could not be read. Please upload a valid Excel file.
import.missingCost: Row {{row}}: Monthly cost missing or invalid.
import.missingSale: Row {{row}}: Monthly sale price missing or invalid.
import.skippedDuplicates: {{count}} rows skipped (line no or IMSI already registered).
import.allSkippedDuplicates: All {{count}} rows already exist; nothing was imported.
import.partialImportWithSkips: {{created}} records added. {{skipped}} rows skipped — details below.

skipReason.duplicate_import_phone: Duplicate line number earlier in this Excel file.
skipReason.duplicate_import_imsi: Duplicate IMSI earlier in this Excel file.

import.partialFailureWarning: Some records may have been saved. Please check the SIM card list.
